# Cek Data Bocor

> Free service for Indonesian users to check if their accounts or emails have been compromised in global public data breaches.

## Site Details
* **Domain**: https://databocor.web.id
* **Language**: Indonesian (User Interface & Recommendations)
* **API Engine**: Integrates with public breach databases securely with local risk assessments and smart mitigations.

## Tech Stack
* **Frontend**: Astro (Static Site Generation), TypeScript, Tailwind CSS.
* **Backend**: FastAPI (Python 3.13), Uvicorn, Pydantic, HTTPX.
* **Architecture**: Clean separation of Static Edge UI and Serverless API.

## Public API Endpoints
* `POST /api/check`: Evaluates breach status, risk score (0-100), risk rating, and returns mitigation recommendations in Indonesian. Expects request body: `{"email": "<email>"}`.
  * Rate-limited: max 10 requests/minute per IP.
  * Cache: 10-minute TTL in-memory.

## Security Policies
* No storage of email addresses or search history.
* Safe header validation (CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options).
